subcodes.first_line: Although revealed for all, He stated that it was specifically intended for those souls who, while outwardly professing love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر چه بعموم نازل شده ولکن فرمودند مخصوص است بنفوس معرضه که حال در ظاهر ادعای حب
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
